item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: All those members of the Drama Club who are participating in today's grade 6 workshop are to report to the stage following announcements.

item.title: A message from Mrs Kwok:
item.description: Reminder to members of Unity Club that there is a meeting today at lunch in room 127. Please arrive promptly as there's lots to do! Also, if anyone is interested in being a panelist for the Pride event in June, please join us today or message Mrs. Kwok or Madame Perron on Teams.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: Students in Grades 7 and 8 are invited to participate in the upcoming University of Waterloo Math Competition! Challenge your curiosity and interest in math - you might even win a prize! The contest will take place on May 20. You can sign up on the sheet posted in your math classroom. Please ask your math teacher or Mrs. Curtis if you have any questions.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: There will be a 7/8 student council meeting today from 11:45-12:05. Please meet Mme Bourdon at the main office.
